description_long: This is a small, stylized doll figure standing on a round, dark base. The doll has a pale complexion with painted facial features, including black eyebrows, black eyes, and red lips. Its hair is painted black and styled in a topknot or bun at the back of the head. The doll is minimally dressed, wearing a green and black loincloth or traditional undergarment, leaving the torso and limbs exposed. The arms are bent at the elbows and positioned in front of the body, with hands meeting at the waist. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, with visible paint details and some minor imperfections.
description: A small, pale doll with painted facial features, black hair in a bun, and a green and black loincloth, standing on a round base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the doll's profile, bent arms, and the topknot hairstyle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the doll's facial features, arm position, and chest details.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, showing the other arm and the green waistband.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head, bun, and the green and black loincloth.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional-style green and black loincloth or undergarment, no upper body clothing, with simple painted details and no visible patterns.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms bent at the elbows and hands meeting in front of the waist, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly upturned red lips, wide open black eyes, and arched black eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short black hair styled in a smooth topknot or bun at the back of the head.
